rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Mimikatz .kirbi File Creation (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)

rules.rule_text:
title: Mimikatz .kirbi File Creation (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)
id: 3f5c1eae-a9ef-44a2-bd04-a8a0e3762ec3
status: experimental
description: Detects .kirbi files created, commonly associated with Mimikatz. Part
  of the RedCanary 2023 Threat Detection Report.
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/threats/mimikatz/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2023/05/10
tags:
- attack.s0002
logsource:
  category: file_event
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    TargetFilename|endswith: .kirbi
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
